title: Let Them Be Here
description: Stop the annoying sudden despawn of hostile mob in peaceful mode!
body:
![the peaceful mode with hostile mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cab3842243ef0b9e80a9a8c3af8cc07b857903e6_0.webp)
**This mod allows you to preserve the hostile mob you once renamed in peaceful difficulty.**
The mob will not disappear. Moreover, it won't attack you unless you switch the difficulty back to easy, normal or hard.
